# Transcrição: Action ItemsM5

- **Duração:** 02:20

## [00:00 - 02:20]

Alright guys, we are at the end of Module 5. I hope you enjoyed that short, sweet, lovable module where you learned exactly how to launch your campaigns and how to track. Now the action items for this week are really simple. I want you to start launching campaigns. So if you have an existing business, you have warm or hot audiences that you can upload to Facebook, I would start with a monetization campaign so that you can start making money from the people that you already have. If you don't, obviously you want to start with an acquisition campaign if you're feeling really excited and really ahead of the curve launching acquisition campaign and a monetization to follow up on your newly found prospects and customers. So again guys, it's time to launch your campaign which is really exciting. Facebook needs at least 3-5 days to optimize your campaign. So after you start running it, please do not touch it for at least 3-5 days to allow for Facebook to optimize. And then next week, if you're watching this real time, next Thursday we're launching a pretty girthy module on scaling, troubleshooting, and optimizing. So once you start to get data back on these campaigns that you're launching, we will be there to hold your hand and show you what to do next. So again guys, thank you so much for your attention and I'm really excited for you. If you have any questions, as always feel free to email me at ptsworkshopatdigitalmarketer.com. I've really enjoyed hearing from you guys. I've started shooting little screen flow videos because there are easier ways to respond back to you. So feel free to send me any questions you have if you want me to critique your creatives, your ad copy, if you're confused about anything in the modules, which traffic plays you should deploy. I'm absolutely here to help you guys. So I will see you next week and I appreciate you.
